ItacAcademyItem.Name: Intrecciati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Wreath of interwined ivy and myrtle
ItacAcademyItem.Motto: Quando fia che sua pari al mondo trovi
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: In 1666 the Intrecciati merged with the Rozzi Academy
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
